params.name: Portable Cooking Set
params.description: Roachiko designed this cooking set in order to eat delicious food anytime, anywhere. Despite the small size, the set comprises various cooking tools, including a kitchen knife, soup spoon, and rice cooker. It is not only sturdy and durable but also extremely lightweight, making it a favorite of Roachiko!
